description.value:
Book, Unique

Tall thin volume in white ermine fur with silver clasp. Cold to the touch. Contains priestly rituals of Auril, the spell Frost Fingers (learnable by wizards), and the poem 'Rime of the Frostmaiden' — an incantation that can split a glacier (Chapter 6).

Property: Possessor has resistance to cold damage.

Found in Auril's abode (Chapter 5).
